description: A vertical graphic built on a dusk photograph of a tall steel border fence topped with concertina wire, with a white-and-green Border Patrol pickup truck parked at its base and hills in the background. Across the lower portion, white serif text with a THE EPOCH TIMES masthead reads Customs and Border Protection Seizes Historic Level of Fentanyl.
notable_text: THE EPOCH TIMES; Customs and Border Protection Seizes Historic Level of Fentanyl
